spec_summary: This handoff contains a static representation of the architecture graph, Context Basket, assistant transcript, packet preview, decisions and trace evidence.
objective: Add a static MVP golden path that demonstrates architecture node selection, Context Basket formation, assistant-guided scoping, and a standardized OpenClaw Handoff Packet preview.
forbidden_actions: Do not create real repo scanning or external connectors
Do not change product scope outside the static Builder Enablement OS demonstration
Do not modify files outside allowed paths
required_work: Add or update static mock data for architecture graph nodes, architecture graph edges, Context Basket, and handoff packet preview
Add static UI state for architecture graph/canvas area, selected node inspector, Context Basket, chat-style assistant panel, and generated handoff packet preview
Add schema or validation coverage where existing validation supports it
acceptance_criteria: User can visually understand Architecture node -> Context Basket -> AI-assisted chat -> Handoff Packet
Handoff packet includes objective, allowed paths, forbidden actions, required work, acceptance criteria, validation commands, stop conditions, and final response format
UI does not imply real execution, live repo scanning, backend, API calls, or deployment
stop_conditions: Stop if a dependency is required
Stop if real repo access or external connector access is needed
Stop if files outside allowed paths must change
Stop if validation fails and cannot be fixed within scope
Stop if product/architecture decision is required
blocked_reasons: Spec fields incomplete or not locked
